title: Gyan Bharatam Mission gains momentum in Kaithal, 387 ancient manuscripts digitised
description: With an aim to preserve India’s centuries-old intellectual and cultural heritage, Kaithal district administration has intensified the National Manuscript Survey under the Gyan Bharatam Mission, with Deputy Commissioner Aparajita directing officials to complete the exercise by June 10. The Union Ministry of Culture had launched the Gyan Bharatam National Manuscript Survey on March 16, 2026, [...]

title: 141 Ancient Gold Coins Found in Luxembourg Buried for 1,700 Years
description: A significant archaeological discovery has occurred in a field in Luxembourg, where a total of 141 gold coins have been unearthed. This remarkable find is being hailed as a connection to a long-lost Roman presence in the region, believed to have been buried for approximately 1,700 years.
